function.message: I can’t complete this inbox task as written because one of the five requested OCR source files is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_04_09__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md` (with the leading underscore). I made no file edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant workflow/schema guidance, verified full target set before filtering/editing, and honored no-partial-edits rule when task is not fully doable.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request specifies OCR for five explicit paths, but only four exist in `50_finance/purchases` and a workspace-wide find returned no result for the underscored fifth filename. Workflow `99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md` requires stopping without partial edits when completion is not doable.
